name: @cosign/provider-turnkey
comment: LIVE adapter (pre-sign CEL policy, @turnkey/sdk-server v6). smoke.ts verifies creds (getWhoami); spike.ts runs the Phase-0 proof (provision sub-org+delegated user+wallet -> applyPolicy -> agent signs in-policy=allowed/over-cap=denied -> freeze -> denied). Testnet-safe (Turnkey only signs).
